hero-lede: Learning a new thing is easier when you are not on your own. The people here are everyday people, just like you. They started where you are now — a bit unsure, but curious too. They are all getting used to AI together, and you can join them.
Learning something new is so much warmer with company. Here you'll find everyday people who started right where you are — a little unsure, but curious — all getting comfortable with AI together.
Learning something new is so much warmer with company. Here you'll find everyday people who started exactly where you are — a little unsure, plenty curious — getting comfortable with AI together.
Learning is warmer with company. Here are everyday people who started exactly where you are — unsure but curious — getting comfortable with AI together.
Everyday people, unsure but curious, getting comfortable with AI together.

The simplest way to join in

join-p: Just type your email below. Now and then we will send you a friendly note with no hard words in it. It might be one small thing we learned, a kind reminder, or a note that says you are not the only one working this out. That is all. That is your welcome.

Pop your email in below. Now and then we'll send a friendly, plain note — a little thing we've learned, a gentle nudge, a reminder you're not the only one figuring this out. That's it. That's the welcome.

Pop your email below and we'll send a friendly, no-jargon note now and then — a small thing we've learned, a gentle nudge, a reminder you're not the only one figuring this out. That's it. That's the welcome.
Add your email and we'll send a friendly, jargon-free note now and then — something we've learned, a nudge, a reminder you're not alone in figuring this out. That's the welcome.
Add your email for occasional friendly, jargon-free notes. That's the welcome.
who-p: No one here is an expert. No one here writes computer code. They are just curious people. They help each other feel more at home with AI, one small step at a time.
Not experts. Not coders. Just curious people, helping each other feel a little more at home with AI.
Not experts. Not coders. Just curious folks, helping each other feel a little more at home with AI.
Not experts or coders — just curious folks helping each other feel at home with AI.
Not experts. Curious folks helping each other feel at home with AI.
ways-h2: There is no wrong way in
ways-p: Choose whatever feels right for you today. You can do more another time, or do nothing at all. There is no pressure here.
Pick whatever feels comfy today. You can always do more later — or nothing at all. No pressure here.
Pick whatever feels comfortable today. You can always do more later — or nothing at all. No pressure here.
Pick whatever feels comfortable today. Do more later, or nothing at all. No pressure.
Pick what suits you today. More later, or nothing. No pressure.
step1-p: This is the easiest place to start. Now and then we send a kind, calm note. That way you always have a quiet friend with you while you learn.
The easiest start. A gentle, calm note now and then, so you've always got a quiet friend as you learn.
The easiest start. A gentle, no-hype note now and then, so you've always got a quiet companion as you learn.
The easiest start. A gentle note now and then — a quiet companion as you learn.
Easiest start: occasional gentle notes, a quiet companion as you learn.
step2-p: Did you have a nice little win with AI? Or a time when it went wrong? Tell us about it. Your story could be the very thing that helps the next nervous person feel a bit braver.
Had a lovely little win with AI? Or a moment when it went sideways? Tell us — your story might be just what helps the next nervous starter feel braver.
Had a lovely little win with AI? Or a moment where it went sideways? Tell us — your story might be exactly what helps the next nervous starter feel braver.
A win with AI, or a moment it went sideways? Tell us — your story might help the next nervous starter feel braver.
Share a win or a misstep — your story can help the next nervous starter.
step3-p: Do you know someone who calls it "chatty" and feels a bit lost? Send them to us. Every kind nudge brings one more person in from the cold.
Know someone who calls it "chatty" and feels a bit lost? Send them our way. Every kind nudge brings one more person in.

spirit-p: Here are a few gentle promises about what it feels like to be here with us.
A few gentle promises about what it feels like to be here.

spirit-curious: AI is new and a bit odd — and that is okay. We meet it with curiosity, not fear. And we will never make you feel silly for asking a question.
AI is new and a bit strange — that's okay. We meet it with curiosity instead of panic, and we never make you feel daft for asking.
AI is new and a bit strange — that's allowed. We meet it with curiosity instead of panic, and we never make you feel daft for asking.
AI is new and strange — that's allowed. We meet it with curiosity, not panic, and never make you feel daft for asking.
AI is new and strange — meet it with curiosity, not panic. No question is daft.
spirit-honest: We do not say big, breathless things like "AI will change your life." We just share real, plain stories — what worked, what did not, and what is worth your time.
No breathless "AI will change your life" talk. Just real, plain experiences — what worked, what didn't, and what's worth your time.
No breathless "AI will change your life" talk. Just real, plain experiences — what worked, what didn't, and what's worth your time.

No hype. Plain experiences — what worked, what didn't, what's worth your time.
spirit-charge: AI is an agent, not the boss. We are here to help you feel more sure of yourself and more in control. We are never here to take the place of your own good sense.
AI is an agent, not the boss. We're here to make you more confident and more in control — never to replace your own good judgment.
AI is an agent, not the boss. We're here to make you more confident and more in control — never to replace your own good judgment.

AI is an agent, not the boss — it sharpens your judgment, never replaces it.
spirit-kindness: What you learn is worth even more when you pass it on. One small tip you share today helps someone feel braver tomorrow. That is the whole idea.
What you learn is worth more when you pass it on. A small tip shared today helps someone feel braver tomorrow. That's the whole idea.

delight-p: These are small, friendly prompts. They pop back up just before you would forget — the way a good friend reminds you of something handy. Give it a try. (It is saved only in your own browser, nowhere else.)

recall-answer: It is simpler than it sounds. It means friendly notes in your inbox, the chance to share your own story, and a warm welcome to people working AI out together. You do not need to be an expert — just kind, curious people like you.
